name: Bistro Lumière
vibe: cozy candlelit neighborhood bistro with open kitchen

signatureDishes.name: Truffle Risotto
signatureDishes.description: Creamy Arborio rice with black truffle shavings and parmesan crisp
signatureDishes.visualDetail: Steam rising, warm golden tones, matte ceramic plate

signatureDishes.name: Slow-braised Lamb Shank
signatureDishes.description: Fall-off-the-bone lamb in red wine reduction with rosemary
